## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed.

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Type Of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test

## Scope

- [ ] Backend (`app/`)
- [ ] Frontend V2 (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Legacy templates (`app/templates/`)
- [ ] Docs / contributor workflow

## Testing

List what you ran and the result.

```bash
make lint
make test
```

## Migration / Compatibility Notes

- [ ] API changes are backward-compatible, or rationale is documented.
- [ ] Legacy behavior impact considered for V2 migration.
- [ ] Docs updated where needed.
